title: astragalus albus
intro: Astragalus albus, also known as white milkvetch, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its white flowers and hairy stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, primarily for its adaptogenic properties, which allow it to help the body adapt to stress and promote overall well-being. The medicinal properties of Astragalus albus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Astragalus albus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
